2606.22385.title: MetaPS: Adaptive Programmatic Strategy Selection for Market Agents
2606.22385.paper_summary: No single market strategy always wins: momentum, mean reversion, risk control,and event-driven rules can each succeed or fail as market conditions change.Rather than asking large language models to directly generate market actions,we study an executable decision paradigm where an agent selects from a library of programmatic strategies, each implemented as a code module mapping market observations to actions.We propose \textbf{MetaPS}, a simulation-guided framework for adaptive programmatic strategy selection. MetaPS rolls out candidate strategies in simulated or backtested markets, identifies states where particular strategies lead to better future outcomes, and converts these state--strategy pairs into supervised fine-tuning data. During inference, the simulator is no longer queried: MetaPS observes only the current market state and candidate strategy context, selects a suitable strategy program, and the selected program produces the final action. Experiments on multi-stock trading and a controlled goods-exchange sandbox show that MetaPS consistently improves across model scales from 0.8B to 9B parameters. It outperforms fixed-strategy baselines, direct decision-making agents, and prompted API-based LLM agents; in several settings, compact fine-tuned models even surpass stronger API models. These results demonstrate that market simulations can provide scalable and targeted supervision for learning adaptive, interpretable, and executable strategy selection.
2606.22385.paper_summary_zh: 沒有任何單一的市場策略總是能夠獲勝：隨著市場條件的變化，動量、均值回歸、風險控制和事件驅動規則都可能成功或失敗。與其要求大型語言模型直接生成市場行動，我們研究了一種可執行的決策範式，其中代理從一個程序化策略庫中選擇，每個策略都作為一個代碼模塊實現，將市場觀察映射到行動。我們提出了\textbf{MetaPS}，這是一個基於模擬的自適應程序化策略選擇框架。MetaPS在模擬或回測市場中推出候選策略，識別特定策略導致更好未來結果的狀態，並將這些狀態-策略對轉換為監督微調數據。在推理過程中，模擬器不再被查詢：MetaPS僅觀察當前市場狀態和候選策略上下文，選擇合適的策略程序，並且所選程序產生最終行動。在多股票交易和受控商品交換沙盒的實驗中，MetaPS在從0.8B到9B參數的模型規模上持續改進。它超越了固定策略基準、直接決策代理和基於提示的API LLM代理；在幾個設置中，緊湊的微調模型甚至超過了更強的API模型。這些結果表明，市場模擬可以為學習自適應、可解釋和可執行的策略選擇提供可擴展和針對性的監督。
2606.22385.author: Jiaxiang Chen et.al.
2606.22385.authors: Jiaxiang Chen, Aotian Luo, Zhouyi Zheng, Weiyi Huang, Chi Zhang, Zenglin Xu
